name: syncrona-monorepo
description: AI-ready ServiceNow MCP server for metadata analysis, dependency graphs, impact analysis, and scoped application documentation.

scripts.build:deps: npm --workspace @syncrona/credential-store run prepack && npm --workspace @syncrona/jira run prepack && npm --workspace @syncrona/sn-transport run prepack
scripts.build: npm run build:deps && npm --workspaces --if-present run prepack
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:mcp && npm run test:shared
scripts.test:shared: npm --workspace @syncrona/jira test && npm --workspace @syncrona/credential-store test && npm --workspace @syncrona/sn-transport test
scripts.test:coverage:core: echo 'core coverage is enforced by test:core (jest --coverage ratchet 92/79/89/92); no-op alias avoids a duplicate full core run (gap-analysis #24)'
scripts.test:coverage:gates: npm run test:coverage:core && npm run test:coverage:mcp
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run build:deps && npm --workspaces --if-present run prepack
scripts.lint: npm run lint:packages && npm run lint:boundaries && npm run lint:boundaries:selftest
scripts.quality:all: npm run quality:core && npm run quality:mcp
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run test:coverage:gates && SKIP_TESTS=1 npm run quality:all && npm run verify:pack

author: Ivan Baev
